title: Service Enumeration Cheatsheet
when_to_use: After port scanning reveals open services

steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Run enum4linux to enumerate SMB shares, users, groups, and system information
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for service enumeration cheatsheet
steps.expected_output: Lists of SMB shares, domain users, groups, system uptime, and NETBIOS information

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Use smbclient to list available SMB shares without authentication
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Enumeration of accessible SMB shares and their permissions

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Execute SNMP walk to enumerate SNMP OIDs and system information if SNMP is open
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: System information, running processes, network interfaces discovered via SNMP

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Attempt DNS zone transfer to obtain authoritative DNS records
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Complete DNS zone file if zone transfer is misconfigured

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Perform DNS brute force to discover additional subdomains and hosts
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: List of discovered subdomains not visible through other methods

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Check for NFS shares and their mount points using showmount
steps.expected_output: List of exported NFS shares and their access restrictions

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Enumerate SMTP users using SMTP user enumeration techniques
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: List of valid email addresses and users on the SMTP server
